title: Settings
displayDescription: Set the system title shown in the admin UI and situation screen.
customTitleHint: Leave empty or restore the default to use the localized system title.
deviceSnDescription: Automatically captured from the detection board message device field. The hardware ID is converted to a standardized SN and saved.
manualDeviceLocationDescription: When GPS has no valid fix, the situation screen map uses this saved device coordinate. Valid GPS still takes priority.
manualDeviceLocationHint: Use WGS84 latitude and longitude. Latitude range is -90 to 90; longitude range is -180 to 180.
manualDeviceLocationInvalid: Enter a valid latitude and longitude
intrusionRetentionDescription: Set how long target intrusion records are kept in the local database. Saving immediately removes records older than the retention period.
intrusionRetentionHint: Calculated by archive time. Keep forever disables automatic cleanup.
warningZoneDescription: Use the current device location or manual coordinates as the center. Positioning targets trigger screen position alarms only when they enter the zone and are not whitelisted.
warningZoneRadiusHint: Enter a radius from {{min}} to {{max}} meters.
warningZoneHint: When disabled, positioning targets still alarm by whitelist. When enabled, only unwhitelisted targets inside the zone alarm.
whitelistDescription: Add, edit, or delete whitelist targets manually, or add them from the situation screen and intrusion positioning lists.
screenAlarmDescription: Detection and FPV lists alarm whenever they contain data. The positioning list alarms only for targets outside the whitelist; sound alerts can also be controlled.
detectionSerialDescription: Select the detection receive/send ports and configure separate receive and send baud rates. Saving connects automatically and reconnects after drops.
detectionBaudRateHint: Receive defaults to 115200 bps and send defaults to 460800 bps. Changing either reconnects detection with the new baud rate.
detectionRxBaudRateHint: Default is 115200 bps. Changing it reconnects detection with the new receive baud rate.
detectionTxBaudRateHint: Default is 460800 bps. Changing it reconnects detection with the new send baud rate.
gpsSerialDescription: Select the NMEA 0183 data port and AT control port. Saving sends AT+QGPS=1 first, then reads GPS NMEA data.
compassSerialDescription: Configure the 600AB 3D compass serial port at fixed 9600 8N1 to inspect raw Pitch, Roll, and Heading angles.
interferenceBandLabelsDescription: Customize the text shown on the three interference band checkboxes in the situation screen operation panel.
interferenceBandLabelsHint: This only changes display text on the situation screen. GPIO channels and control behavior stay unchanged.
interferenceBandLabelsCleared: Interference band labels restored to default
gpsRecordsDescription: View the latest received NMEA 0183 raw data and parsed positioning results.
intrusionsDescription: Review archived intrusion records after targets disappear from the situation screen lists.
intrusionDeleteConfirmDescription: Delete the selected {{count}} target intrusion records? This cannot be undone.
intrusionNoMatch: No intrusion records match the current filters
interferenceReportsDescription: Review evidence reports generated automatically for situation-screen interference operations. Evidence reports are retained by default; only failed startup reports can be deleted.
interferenceReportNoMatch: No reports match the current filters
interferenceReportDeleteConfirmDescripti: Delete this failed interference report? This cannot be undone.
deceptionReportsDescription: Review evidence reports generated automatically for spoofing sessions. Evidence reports are retained by default; only failed startup reports can be deleted.
deceptionReportNoMatch: No reports match the current filters
deceptionReportDeleteConfirmDescription: Delete this failed spoofing report? This cannot be undone.
languageDescription: Configure which languages appear in the admin and screen language menus.
currentLanguageRequired: The current language is kept automatically so the switcher cannot become empty.
mapLayerDescription: Configure which map layers appear in the situation screen map layer menu.
mapLayerAtLeastOne: Keep at least one map layer. Chinese defaults to Gaode Satellite; English defaults to Google Satellite.
networkDescription: View and configure IPv4 settings for each interface. Saving applies the change through NetworkManager and may briefly interrupt connectivity.
networkSelectInterfaceHint: Choose an interface first, then edit the configuration on the right.
networkConfigurationHint: Use DHCP for most networks. Switch to static only when a fixed address is required.
networkRouteMetricHint: Lower values have higher priority. Leave empty for system automatic priority
networkPriorityDescription: Adjust the order used by interface connections. Wi-Fi appears here as a wireless interface after connection.
networkUnmanagedHint: This interface has no NetworkManager connection and cannot be configured here.
networkUnsupportedPlatform: Network configuration is not supported on this system, so the feature is disabled.
networkInvalidPrefix: Prefix must be an integer from 1 to 32
networkInvalidDNS: DNS servers must be valid IPv4 addresses
networkInvalidRouteMetric: Network priority must be an integer from 0 to 9999
wifiDescription: Scan nearby Wi-Fi networks and connect to a wireless network. After connection, configure IP settings in the interface section below.
wifiUnavailable: No available Wi-Fi device was detected, so the feature is disabled.
deceptionSerialDescription: Configure the GNSS signal-source serial port for screen spoofing control and status.
